lines.title: Japan Emergency Numbers — Police 110 / Fire & Ambulance 119 (警察110番・消防/救急119番)
lines.organization: National Police Agency (警察庁) / municipal Fire & Disaster Management agencies (消防庁・各市町村消防本部)
lines.cost: free (callable from any phone including public payphones)
lines.notes: Japan uses TWO emergency numbers, NOT a single 911-style code: 110 reaches the Police; 119 reaches Fire and Ambulance. For immediate life-threatening danger (active suicide attempt, medical emergency) this is the line to direct a person to. kokoro (心) is community/spiritual/relational mental-health SUPPORT routing only — NOT clinical psychiatry, NOT state-licensed psychology, NOT diagnosis/treatment (ADR-2605263700 + Charter §1.13 Wellbecoming). It renders no clinical opinion; it only routes to this OFFICIAL emergency number. UNVERIFIED SEED — a maintainer must re-verify before any live use. #7119 (medical advice) exists in many regions but coverage is not nationwide, so it is intentionally not listed as a standalone entry.

lines.title: Yorisoi Hotline (よりそいホットライン)
lines.organization: 一般社団法人 社会的包摂サポートセンター (Social Inclusion Support Center), MHLW-subsidized project (厚生労働省 補助事業)
lines.contact: 0120-279-338 (IP phone: 050-3655-0279); press 2 after the guidance for the foreign-language line
lines.cost: free (toll-free フリーダイヤル; reachable from mobile and public phones)
lines.notes: Nationally recognized, MHLW (厚生労働省) subsidized free 24/7 line operated by the Social Inclusion Support Center; covers life/work/housing/suicidal ideation (自殺念慮)/mental distress/DV and more, with a dedicated foreign-language option. Listed on the MHLW 'まもろうよ こころ' portal. kokoro (心) is community/spiritual/relational mental-health SUPPORT routing only — NOT clinical psychiatry, NOT state-licensed psychology, NOT diagnosis/treatment (ADR-2605263700 + Charter §1.13 Wellbecoming); it only ROUTES to this recognized crisis line and renders no clinical opinion. For immediate life-threatening danger direct to 110/119. UNVERIFIED SEED — maintainer must re-verify number, hours, and language schedule before any live use.

lines.title: Inochi no Denwa — Lifeline (いのちの電話)
lines.organization: 一般社団法人 日本いのちの電話連盟 (Federation of Inochi no Denwa, Japan)
lines.contact: 0570-783-556 (national navi-dial ナビダイヤル); toll-free フリーダイヤル 0120-783-556
lines.hours: Navi-dial 0570-783-556: 10:00–22:00 daily, year-round. Toll-free 0120-783-556: 16:00–21:00 daily, plus 08:00 on the 10th of each month through 08:00 the next morning (monthly 24h day)
lines.cost: Navi-dial line: caller pays standard call charges (NOT covered by mobile flat-rate/free-call plans). Toll-free 0120 line: free
lines.notes: Long-running, nationally recognized volunteer-staffed suicide-prevention and emotional-support lifeline (member of IFOTES / Befrienders network). Japanese language only. Note the cost asymmetry: the 0570 navi-dial is NOT free and is excluded from mobile unlimited-call plans, whereas the 0120 toll-free line is free but has limited daily hours. kokoro (心) is community/spiritual/relational mental-health SUPPORT routing only — NOT clinical psychiatry, NOT state-licensed psychology, NOT diagnosis/treatment (ADR-2605263700 + Charter §1.13 Wellbecoming); it only ROUTES to this recognized crisis line and renders no clinical opinion. For immediate life-threatening danger direct to 110/119. UNVERIFIED SEED — maintainer must re-verify both numbers and hours before any live use.

For immediate life-threatening danger direct to 110/119. UNVERIFIED SEED — maintainer must re-verify number and current operation before any live use.

lines.title: TELL Lifeline (Tokyo English Lifeline)
lines.organization: TELL (一般社団法人 TELL / Tokyo English Lifeline)
lines.hours: Phone: Sat 09:00 – Mon 23:00 continuous, Tue–Thu 09:00–23:00, Fri 09:00–02:00. Chat: daily from 16:00. (Hours change periodically — confirm on site)
lines.notes: Long-established (since the 1970s) free, anonymous English-language emotional-support and crisis lifeline plus live chat — the most widely recognized English-speaker resource in Japan, useful where Japanese-language lines (e.g. Inochi no Denwa) cannot serve the caller. Hours are revised periodically, so they are marked as confirm-on-site. kokoro (心) is community/spiritual/relational mental-health SUPPORT routing only — NOT clinical psychiatry, NOT state-licensed psychology, NOT diagnosis/treatment (ADR-2605263700 + Charter §1.13 Wellbecoming); it only ROUTES to this recognized line and renders no clinical opinion.
